title: Auto Refill Slot
description: When you break/place your last item in a hotbar slot (e.g., last dirt block or torch), it auto-refills from inventory if available.
body:
🧱 About Auto Refill Slot

> Never get interrupted mid-build or mid-fight again. Auto Refill Slot ensures seamless gameplay by automatically refilling your hotbar slot when you use up the last item — whether it's a dirt block, torch, snowballs, or any stackable item.

> When a stack runs out, the mod instantly pulls a matching item from your inventory, keeping the flow going without needing to open your inventory.

⚙️ Smart Refill Logic

- Works with blocks, tools, and more

- Only activates if the same item is available

🚀 Lightweight and Client-Side Only

- Designed for convenience without any server-side requirements. Ideal for builders, redstoners, and adventurers alike.

📦 Perfect for survival gameplay, building sessions, or any time you want less hassle and more action.
